title: VIRAT KOHLI'S ENGLAND MASTERCLASS - The ABSOLUTE REDEMPTION! 🔥🔥🔥
hook: The KING returns in ENGLAND and England's bowlers had NO IDEA what was coming... 😱

facts.heading: The Arrival
facts.text: After YEARS of WAITING... after ALL the doubts... Virat Kohli WALKS UP! Look at that FACE!

facts.heading: Revenge Cricket
facts.text: This is NOT just batting! This is REVENGE CRICKET! Watch his FOCUS! His INTENSITY! Every shot is HIT WITH PURPOSE!

facts.heading: Shot Making Masterclass
facts.text: DRIVES like MISSILES! CUTS splitting FIELDERS! England's bowlers are SWEATING! The crowd's going ABSOLUTELY MENTAL!

facts.heading: The Comeback Cinema
facts.text: This is the COMEBACK we've been WAITING FOR! This is CINEMA! This is LEGACY! Watch him RECLAIM HIS THRONE!

facts.heading: The Greatest
facts.text: THAT'S what happens when a CHAMPION comes BACK! THIS is why Virat Kohli is the GREATEST!

outro: PEAK CRICKET! The legend is BACK! 🔥💯🚀
